name: nankai-business-review-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《南开管理评论》 (Nankai Business Review), the top Chinese business-school journal for theory-building management research grounded in the China context.

plugins.name: nankai-business-review-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the 《南开管理评论》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, fit positioning, theory-gap articulation, mechanism-backed hypothesis development, measurement rigor (reliability / validity / common-method-bias), survey-SEM (mediation / moderation / moderated mediation / HLM), experiments, multi-case / grounded theory, China contextualization, discussion that advances a management theory, submission preflight, and rebuttal.
